title: No eval in production
description: Do not use eval() or dynamic code execution in production code paths.

title: Prefer immutable data
description: Prefer immutable data structures and avoid mutating shared state where practical.

title: All tests must pass before task completion
description: A task cannot be marked complete until all unit tests (ASSERT_UNIT_TESTS_PASS.ps1) and all E2E tests (ASSERT_E2E_TESTS_PASS.ps1) pass. Linting (ASSERT_LINTING.ps1) must also pass.

title: Use HARNESS artifacts
description: Tasks go in TASKS.jsonl; guardrails in GUARDRAILS.jsonl; progress in PROGRESS.jsonl. Follow schemas under HARNESS/ARTIFACTS.

title: LinkML/Pydantic type-driven development in statesim
description: In statesim: (1) Schema source of truth is LinkML YAML (statesim/schema/linkml/statesim_schema.yaml); (2) Pydantic models in statesim/schema/models.py are AUTO-GENERATED — do not edit by hand; (3) Regenerate models after schema changes by running: python scripts/regen_linkml_models.py; (4) Prefer typed APIs using the generated Pydantic models from statesim.schema.models for domain and table-backed types.
